title: RocketPlaceholders
description: Create custom placeholders for PlaceholderAPI with a lot of custom conditions.
body:
![Title: RocketPlaceholders - Advanced PlaceholderAPI provider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2addd3a5fe8f13f51a4f12ed62aafbf3922f145c_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>Java 16+ Disclaimer</summary>
If you use 1.17 or Java 15+ you have to install JShader
</details>

RocketPlaceholders allows you to create custom placeholders with lots of custom conditions.

![Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/457529b5de20cf0b2e49713bf9eb9c1b006d4afb_0.webp)

Installing RocketPlaceholders is very easy.

1. Install PlaceholderAPI
2. Install RocketPlaceholders
3. Start the server

![Configuration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd7fbd91e84e884f32506fb6754be4adb90e16f4_0.webp)

An advanced plugin must have an advanced configuration
Click [here](https://wiki.lorenzo0111.me/rocketplaceholders) to learn more about how to configure RocketPlaceholders.

![API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c9a9c971ab2034922f08345180879b919bf4dc1_0.webp)

Do you want to create a plugin that provides custom placeholders? With our [api](https://wiki.lorenzo0111.me/rocketplaceholders/api) you can create your custom placeholders.
